title: rubus alutaceus
intro: Rubus alutaceus, also known as the yellow raspberry, is a type of thorny shrub native to Asia, belonging to the Rubus genus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral compounds, which contribute to its health benefits. Consuming Rubus alutaceus is said to provide health benefits such as reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus alutaceus typically involve drying and processing the leaves, stems, and roots to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
